name: MangaGalaxy
warnings: @Broken: redirects to VortexScans; shares vortexscans.org domain but does NOT use the api. subdomain (useAPI=false), so reader images come from the Next.js HTML fallback only

name: Nyx Scans
warnings: Base list/details/tags are served by the engine, but three real parsing methods are overridden and NOT captured by config: (1) POPULARITY+empty filter on page 1 scrapes the 'popularPosts' Next.js blob off the homepage before falling back to /api/query; (2) parseMangaList drops titles containing '[Novel]'; (3) getPages resolves the numeric chapterId by slug via /api/query + /api/chapters when chapter.id is absent, and its HTML fallback uses selectPages + img.src().distinct() with an explicit 'images unavailable' error. Engine gives correct browse/details; page-list edge cases and [Novel] filtering need custom logic.

name: Qi Scans
warnings: NOT a true IkenParser subclass: QiScans extends PagedMangaParser directly and reimplements a WHOLLY DIFFERENT REST API (https://api.qimanhwa.com/api/v1 with /series, /series/search, /series/{slug}, /series/{slug}/chapters, /series/{slug}/chapters/{chapterSlug}). Different JSON shapes (data[] arrays, avgRating/5, alternativeTitles split on ' • '), paginated chapter fetch (perPage=30), chapter.url is a JSON {slug,chapterSlug} blob, sort orders UPDATED/POPULARITY/NEWEST, and a distinct status map (HIATUS->PAUSED, MASS_RELEASED->ONGOING). NONE of this is expressible in IkenConfig; it is retained here only for family completeness and requires its own engine.
